channel.title: SunnySideUp KCMO Home Page on SunnySideUp | Spreading Joy & Building Community
channel.description: Recent content in SunnySideUp KCMO Home Page on SunnySideUp | Spreading Joy & Building Community

item.title: Contact Us | SunnySideUp
item.description:
Get In Touch with SunnySideUp

We want to hear from you! Whether you have a donation to drop off, a partnership idea, or just a question, we are here to help.

📧 General Inquiries

For simple questions, donations, or general information, please email us.

  • Email: (Coming Soon)

📞 Volunteer & Partnership Inquiries

For scheduling a volunteer shift or discussing corporate partnerships, please call or fill out a form.

  • Phone: (Coming Soon)
  • Email: (Coming Soon)

🗺️ Local Drop-Off Points

We aim to have designated areas across the community for easy, anonymous drop-offs:

item.title: Get Involved | SunnySideUp
item.description:
How Can You Help Us Build Happiness?

Being part of SunnySideUp means being a hands-on contributor. Whether you have time, resources, or just a willingness to show up, there is a way for you to make a direct impact.

🧤 Volunteer Your Time

Your time is perhaps our most valuable resource. We need hands for every effort—from sorting donations to directing cleanups.

How to Sign Up:

  1. Online Form: Fill out our dedicated volunteer interest form (Coming Soon) to let us know your availability and skills.
  2. Direct Contact: Call us at (Coming Soon)and ask to speak to the Volunteer Coordinator.
  3. Show Up: Keep an eye on our Instagram page (https://www.instagram.com/sunnysideupkcmo/) for scheduled cleanup days and donation sorting events!

♻️ Donate Items (Material Support)

Donations are welcome any time! Please ensure all donated items are clean, in good working condition, and usable.

item.title: Our Mission | SunnySideUp
item.description:
Our Mission: Building a Stronger Community, Together

At SunnySideUp, we believe that happiness is built from the ground up—by caring for one another and taking proactive steps to improve our shared environment. We are committed to transforming despair into action, turning donations into dignity, and effort into visible change.

Our mission is driven by three core pillars of action:

🧺 1. Feeding Our Neighbors (Food Donations)

Hunger knows no social boundaries. Our food donation efforts are designed to ensure that every person in our community has access to nutritious meals.
